summary: Tests cover core matrix generation logic (cartesian product, include/exclude, max_parallel, fail_fast, max_size validation) but miss critical paths: no unit test for Read-MatrixConfig (config file loading), no actual JSON output structure validation (only string matching), no integration tests for config→matrix→JSON pipeline. Edge cases are sparse (single-axis matrix, empty rules, partial exclude matches, duplicate includes untested). Test design lacks fixture factories/helpers causing repetition; Run-ActTests.ps1 integration test references non-existent fixture files and unclear workflow I/O. Error handling tested minimally. Suite would catch obvious regressions but miss subtle bugs in config parsing, JSON serialization, and edge case handling.
